name: Peachy Pie
recipeIngredient: Unbaked Pie Crust for a 10-Inch Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the peaches and cornstarch and set aside.
2. Cook the cream cheese and sour cream until thickened, stirring constantly.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the eggs, lemon juice, and sugar. Add the cheese mixture and beat until cool.
4. Arrange the peaches in the unbaked pie crust.
5. Pour the filling over the peaches. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
6. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes, then reduce to 350°F and bake for about 30-35 minutes. If necessary, cover with a sheet of foil to retard browning.
7. The pie may also be made with a double crust by following the same directions as for a single crust. Cover with a lattice or regular top crust over the pie filling.
